reasoning: The ECB deposit facility rate is at 2.00% as of October 30, 2025. The easing cycle has reportedly concluded or will see one further minor cut. None of the expert polls or economic indicators suggest an impending rate hike; inflation is projected to drop below target (1.7% in 2026) and growth is slow (0.2% in Q3). For 2025-11-16, a hike is virtually impossible due to the absence of scheduled meetings. For 2025-12-09, the next meeting will likely result in a hold or cut, not a hike. For 2026-02-07, while uncertainty slightly increases with time, the macroeconomic landscape strongly argues against starting a new hiking cycle. Thus, probabilities of a rate increase are placed near the minimum allowed bounds.
batch_queries: Will the European Central Bank's deposit facility rate for the euro area have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-11-09?
